# All about fooooood

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
food <- read.csv("data/Food.csv")
head(food)
Neighborhood <- read.csv("data/2020_Neighborhood_Tabulation_Areas_(NTAs)_20260422.csv")
Neighborhood <- Neighborhood |> rename(geometry = the_geom)
data <- food |> left_join(Neighborhood, by = c("Neighborhood.Tabulation.Area.NTA." = "NTA2020"))

data |> ggplot() + 
  geom_sf() + 
  geom_sf_text(aes(label = Neighborhood.Tabulation.Area.NTA.), size = 3) + 
  scale_fill_distiller(palette = "Greens", direction = 1) 

```
